faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sri Ramakrishna Degree College for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sri Ramakrishna Degree College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
BBA Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3 years duration (10+2+3 pattern) in any discipline conducted by the Universities or its equivalent as recognised by U.G.C and secured the above mentioned percentage. 45% is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved category. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible.
B.Sc. Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
B.Com Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
B.A. Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.
BCA Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Boards/Council. For Management Quota : Candidate must have passed with 35% marks.

placements.overview:
Founded in 1984, Sri Ramakrishna Degree College is an institute. It is located in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Sri Ramakrishna Degree College provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 18 courses across specialisation such as Finance. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., MCA, BCA and B.Com. Sri Ramakrishna Degree College fees ranges between INR 30,000 to 70,000. The student intake for these courses is 1230. Sri Ramakrishna Degree College offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. Sri Ramakrishna Degree College offers all the campus facilities to students.

Sri Ramakrishna Degree College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Sri Ramakrishna Degree College offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Sri Ramakrishna Degree College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 30,000 to 70,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Our batch was done with the placement with the company Genpact with a good package. Many companies are recruiting us like Microsoft, Google, etc. Our batch was provided good internships with good knowledge and certificates which will be used in the resume.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The hostel has a good maintenance. The hostel has a strict rules. Mobile phones are not allowed. The food is good. They are following rules and regulations according to the government. They are providing labs and medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, you can gain some knowledge at an affordable price from our college.

review_content.Placements: This is one of the degree colleges in our locality. There are no placements in our college. However, our college provides training on reasoning, verbal ability, arithmetic ability, soft skills and communication skills for students who are interested in participating in off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: You can find a library, computer lab, electronics lab, physics lab, etc., here. You can get a limited Wi-Fi facility. The hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. Classrooms are average, and a playground is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, and placements were good in 2019.

review_content.Placements: I completed my B.Sc. MSCS in the year 2016-19. Our statistics department has very experienced lecturers. Our faculty members are supportive and encourage students in all fields. In our college, we have both NCC and NSS units. Our NCC and NSS units have served many people in many situations. We have a separate NCC unit for boys and girls namely 9 (a) girls BNN, Kurnool leader by DRM Captain V. C. Lalitha Saraswati Garu and. 28 (a) boys BNN, Kurnool led by N. Bhaskar Reddy Garu. The college provides e-classrooms, an also has a placement cell. Every year students get placed in top MNC companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Deloitte, and they offer positions like operations executive, associate analyst, etc. The college conducts many national fests like spring fest by the business administration department, and computer Science fest, math rates by mathematics department and also sports meet. In association with APSSDC, we have many job mela held in our college. Students get trained in programming languages like C, Java, Python, PHP, DBMS, SQL Server, Amazon Web services AWS classes, arithmetic and reasoning classes. And also free groups coaching during summer, bank coaching is being offered for hostel girls in the hostel itself. Many facilities are provided and students are supported by faculty and administration. I got placed in Infosys technologies Ltd as an operations executive during campus placements with an average package salary offered to me was 2.2 LPA. I am feeling very happy and proud of our college. Along with me, nearly more than 50 students got selected in these MNC companies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2018

review_content.Placements: The college has offered placements, but on Graduation, level can't get much-expected salary package the average of INR 2 Lacs, some companies visit like Jindal cements, Jaya Jyothi cements, SPY REDDY AGROS, NANDI PIPES, etc. Companies visit and select the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure that consists of a library, computer lab, Seminar hall, Auditorium, two indoor stadiums one badminton and one from shooting, the college has a good place of the playground to play outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the right choice for a good education.

review_content.Placements: The college has offered good placements with a salary package of 1.5 LPA. Good companies visit the campus for placements. Students are placed in reputed companies like Nandi Pipes, Jindal Cements, SPY Reddy Agro Chemicals, etc. Students can be placed in a company for their bright future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. The college offers a good atmosphere. The campus is spread over 5 acres. It consists of a library, seminar hall, auditorium, and an indoor stadium. There is a playground to play many games, like cricket, football, hockey, volleyball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Business Management (BBM) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with good staff, everyone will be satisfied in the process of joining.

review_content.Placements: They have a placement with a heavy job opportunity and a good management process of interviews with an extraordinary staff. The way they interact with the people and with the management is very good. But, the expected salary was not much.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a library, stadium, ground, function hall, computer lab, and staff room, and canteen, no Wi-Fi. Spring fest, fresher party, etc. are organized in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified teachers, and knowledgeable teachers with the staff with the impeccable academic qualified and qualifications good overall everyone will be satisfied in the following placement and good staff, with trained lectures.

Every year students get placed in top MNC companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Deloitte, and they offer positions like operations executive, associate analyst, etc. The college conducts many national fests like spring fest by the business administration department, and computer Science fest, math rates by mathematics department and also sports meet. Students get trained in programming languages like C, Java, Python, PHP, DBMS, SQL Server, Amazon Web services AWS classes, arithmetic and reasoning classes. And also free groups coaching during summer, bank coaching is being offered for hostel girls in the hostel itself. Many facilities are provided and students are supported by faculty and administration. I got placed in Infosys technologies Ltd as an operations executive during campus placements with an average package salary offered to me was 2.2 LPA. I am feeling very happy and proud of our college. Along with me, nearly more than 50 students got selected in these MNC companies.

placements.overview: Established in 2010, St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology is a private institute in Jalandhar, Punjab. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 16 courses across 9 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science and Animation, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 396 students. The fees at St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology is INR 2,82,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is very good college for doing engineering. My experience in this college is too good.

review_content.Placements: The job fair is organised by the college every year. They also guide you on which company is best suits you for training. Many reputed companies are joined the job fair and placed the students from the campus. The companies also offer hood packages to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided like canteen hostel, mess and the infrastructure is too good. The library is also available in the college. The classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also part of the organisation. Every year sports meet is organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The facilities and placements are very good on the campus.

review_content.Placements: Most of the companions visit the campus for placements, like MRF, Nexa, etc., in which, many candidates got selected. One of my friends got selected in MRF company with a salary package of around 5 LPA. I'm thankful to this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition like benches, tables, and examination halls. The classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also good. All the staff members cooperate with all of us. Buildings are in excellent condition, and the greenery on the campus keeps the atmosphere awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good at certain aspects.

review_content.Placements: A good number of placement drives are conducted in the college. But, the companies that visit the college aren't humongous usually. They try to improvise it and make it grow like other colleges in the region. I have seen 3 placement drives in my tenure of 2 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are more spacious than any other college I have seen. Wooden desks and tables are provided for seating, which doesn't look low-class at all. The roads are macadamized. Wi-Fi facility is very limited. The canteen is classy. The library is very small compared to other facilities (or rooms) in the college. A gymnasium is available in every boys' hostel for free, though the low-quality equipment is present. The hostel warden is good and takes the responsibilities of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placements.

review_content.Placements: During placement time, lots of companies came to our institute and picked 40 to 50 students from every batch, so it is good and great. Mostly, developer role is offered by the company, so it is good for those students who have to become a developer. It is good for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every class has Wi-Fi facility. There are proper seating arrangement and proper lighting condition. The A/C facilities are also provided and heater. The labs are good. Our college provides every facility for student and faculty, so there is no problem for students. There is a sports ground present. There are medical facilities also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015

review_content.Other: My college is located behind NIT Jalandhar. It has all the facilities which are required for a complete college. I will describe below the pros and cons of my college. Pros: The college has good faculty members, an excellent student cafe and excellent classrooms, labs and festival programs. Cons: They cannot give proper knowledge for practical work and better placement options for their students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is up to the mark in our college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are very good. Almost 15-20 companies come to the campus from different parts of our country to recruit students. Almost every year, 100-200 students get placed in companies that come here. In our batch, almost 30 students got placed. Among our seniors, almost 200 students were recruited. The average salary offered is 20,000-30,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has hi-tech labs. Good quality food is available in the canteen and hostel. The heating and cooling facilities are available in hostel rooms. Medical facilities are available in our college. We didn't face any problems in the college during our tenure.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and less fees.

content.Placements: Placements in Rise College are average, and there are two campuses, Gandhi and Prakasam. content.Infrastructure: The Rise college infrastructure is very good with a pleasant atmosphere,the hostels and classrooms were neat and clean. The college was filled with trees, and it was very green. Overall, the college infrastructure is very good, and the food in the mess is very good.

content.Faculty: It depends on whether the faculty was helpful or not, and some are knowledgeable, and the technique quality is also somewhat good. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes the students industry ready. The pass percentage in our college is 80% and its good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and less fees.
reviews.review_text: The Rise college infrastructure is very good with a pleasant atmosphere,the hostels and classrooms were neat and clean. The college was filled with trees, and it was very green. Overall, the college infrastructure is very good, and the food in the mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for your course/department are labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, Library, sports equipment, etc. The quality of our hostel canteen, medical, sports, and gaming facilities is good.

reviews.review_heading: Average B.Tech life is also poor.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the campus is full of greenery, and they maintain a good environment. The canteen is also a little bit good, but the food is the worst, and our college hostel is a bit strict. We have to wash our clothes on our own, and the college hostel's mess food is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with below-average B.Tech life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good when compared to the present college infrastructure. The hostel facility is decent, and the hostel food is good, not average or top of the line. The hostel rooms are average; they are very small.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with no B.Tech life.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is not up to the mark, nor is it average it's good when compared to the present infrastructure our computer block is stunning, and it is equipped with central air-conditioners. When it comes to the hostel, it's below average, not up to the mark, but food is negotiable, which is satisfactory for the price we are paying, so our college infrastructure and hostel are not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: It's better not to join my college.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is not bad. My college has 5 labs, one big library, a tennis court, a basketball court, and a small space for other games. My college hostel is the worst, it has very little space, just a single room for eight members, and only that room is enough for sleeping.

reviews.review_heading: A normal college with strict rules.
reviews.review_text: Campus offers Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with 24/7 water and power. Mess food is average, canteen is decent, medical aid is available, and sports facilities are good. It will be very happy.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with a normal tuition fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good when compared to other colleges. Many labs are equipped with the latest items and are air-conditioned. The hostel interior and water supply are good. The food is decent for what we pay for our hostel fee.

reviews.review_heading: It just like school but you can manage by maintaining attendance self study at home.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not as good as we expected, e.g., very few classrooms have projectors. Library access will be available, but no Wi-Fi facilities for 1 semester. You may get sports, which was your last, including regular situations, like sometimes lectures will take the classes. No gym, the quality of food is regular (not much), and the canteen is available only during break time, i.e., 10 min. Hostel: regular things.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty members, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good with lots of trees on the campus. It has separate floors for all departments like CSE, EEE, ECE and other departments. There are 2 hostels for girls and boys. In our college, there are good Wi-Fi systems. We have separate labs for all departments.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning and decent campus.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department at Rise has well equipped labs with high speed Wi Fi smart classrooms and access to a digital library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms. It has average quality mess food basic medical support and sports like cricket volleyball and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for local students.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, no Wi-Fi, good environment in labs and classrooms. Medical facilities are limited, but hospitals are nearby. The college canteen proved to have not good food, I mean not hygienic. The campus is a good environment.  Hostel is good, but there are some restrictions.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied as they told teachers are from IIT, but many are still reading.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is below average, and sometimes we may see cockroaches and mosquitoes also. Wi-Fi is very poor for students. It does not allow phones for 2 years. Washrooms are not good. Current is not available for like 3-4 hours. Room sharing is available for 6 members, which may be convenient. It has common washrooms. Our college should provide a library period.

reviews.review_heading: It was good and suggestable for local or nearby students, but don't expect more like top colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is so good, but hostel buildings have some repairs and discomforts for fans, light, and current supply. Our college consists minimum range of labs for students. Projectors and large classrooms for all students, so it is good to listen to classes.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college and college life are beautiful.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Hostel is hygienic, where our labs are filled with high-performance computers, and our library block is similar to a tier 2 colleges, which possess high-quality books. Even our hostel rooms are good, and food is good. Our hostel fees are very cheap compared to other hostel fees.
